title: Chronic and Acute Phloridzin Treatment Protocol
author: Jason Kim
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xujfnun

steps.title: Anesthetize mice with an intraperitoneal injection...
steps.instruction: Anesthetize mice with an intraperitoneal injection of ketamine (100 mg/kg body weight) and xylazine (10 mg/kg body weight).

steps.title: Shave hair at the incision site on the back
steps.instruction: Shave hair at the incision site on the back.

steps.title: Make an incision (~0
steps.instruction: Make an incision (~0.5 cm) using sterilized scalpel between the scapulae.

steps.title: Subcutaneously insert an Alzet mouse osmotic pump containing phloridzin (0
steps.instruction: Subcutaneously insert an Alzet mouse osmotic pump containing phloridzin (0.4 mg/kg body weight).

steps.title: Suture or close the incision site using sterilized staples
steps.instruction: Suture or close the incision site using sterilized staples.

steps.title: Administer ketoprofen to minimize pain and house mice individually
steps.instruction: Administer ketoprofen to minimize pain and house mice individually.

steps.title: Alternatively, phloridzin may be chronically administered...
steps.instruction: Alternatively, phloridzin may be chronically administered using a twice daily intraperitoneal injection at 0.4 mg/kg body weight.

steps.title: Survival surgery is performed to establish...
steps.instruction: Survival surgery is performed to establish a chronic indwelling catheter at 5~6 days prior to experiment for intravenous infusion. (refer to M

steps.title: Mice are fasted overnight (~15 hours)...
steps.instruction: Mice are fasted overnight (~15 hours) or for 5 hours prior to the start of experiment.

steps.title: Place a mouse in a rat-size...
steps.instruction: Place a mouse in a rat-size restrainer with its tail tape-tethered at one end.

steps.title: Expose and flush the intravenous catheter using saline solution
steps.instruction: Expose and flush the intravenous catheter using saline solution. Then, connect the catheter to the CMA Microdialysis infusion pump.

steps.title: Phloridzin is intravenously infused at 100...
steps.instruction: Phloridzin is intravenously infused at 100 g/kg/min for 60~120 min to lower serum glucose levels in hyperglycemic, diabetic mice.
